function s(s)return j[s-(-976073+993459)]end do local s=string.char local b=table.insert local o=string.len local f=math.floor local N=table.concat local L=string.sub local p=type local return(function(j,o,f,N,L,p,V,b,n,k,c,U,P,v,d,z,J,O,t,q,G,Z,B,F,g)Z,G,b,g,O,v,F,d,z,k,c,q,n,J,U,t,P,B=function(j,s)local o=J(s)local f=function(...)return b(j,{...},s,o)end return f
